51.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said during his final illness: 'O Aisha, what happened to the gold?' She brought between five and nine pieces, and he began turning them over in his hand saying: 'What would Muhammad think of Allah if he were to meet Him while these are with him? Spend them.'
51.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda dalam sakit terakhirnya: 'Wahai Aisyah, apa yang terjadi dengan emas itu?' Ia membawa antara lima hingga sembilan keping, dan beliau mulai memutarnya di tangannya sambil berkata: 'Apa yang akan Muhammad pikirkan tentang Allah jika ia bertemu-Nya sementara ini ada padanya? Infakkanlah semuanya.'

52.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to say frequently in his bowing: 'Glory be to You, O Allah our Lord, and with Your praise, Our Lord forgive me' — interpreting the Quran [i.e., the verse commanding tasbih and istighfar].
52.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ sering mengucapkan dalam rukuknya: 'Maha Suci Engkau, ya Allah Tuhan kami, dan dengan memuji-Mu, ya Tuhan kami ampunilah aku' — sebagai pengamalan firman Allah [yakni ayat yang memerintahkan tasbih dan istighfar].

53.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Al-kharaj is due with al-daman [profit comes with responsibility].'
53.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Al-kharaj mengikuti al-daman [keuntungan disertai dengan tanggung jawab].'

54.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'When dawn broke, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would pray only two rak'ahs, and I believe he recited only the opening chapter of the Book in them.'
54.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika fajar terbit, Rasulullah ﷺ hanya shalat dua rakaat, dan aku kira beliau hanya membaca pembukaan Al-Kitab di dalamnya.'

55.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked what the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to do among his family. She said: 'He would busy himself with household tasks, and when the prayer time came, he would go out to the prayer.'
55.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apa yang biasa dilakukan Rasulullah ﷺ di antara keluarganya. Ia berkata: 'Beliau menyibukkan diri dengan pekerjaan rumah tangga, dan ketika waktu shalat tiba, beliau keluar untuk shalat.'

56.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked whether Muhammad ﷺ had seen his Lord. She said: 'Glory be to Allah, my hair stood on end at what you said! Whoever tells you that Muhammad ﷺ saw his Lord has lied.' Then she recited: "No vision can grasp Him" and "It is not given to any human being that Allah should speak to them except by revelation or from behind a veil." And she said: 'Whoever tells you what will happen tomorrow has lied,' then recited: "Indeed, with Allah is knowledge of the Hour."'
56.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Muhammad ﷺ melihat Tuhannya. Ia berkata: 'Maha Suci Allah, bulu kudukku merinding mendengar apa yang kamu katakan! Barangsiapa memberitahumu bahwa Muhammad ﷺ melihat Tuhannya, ia telah berdusta.' Kemudian ia membaca: "Penglihatan tidak dapat menjangkau-Nya" dan "Tidak mungkin bagi seorang manusia bahwa Allah berbicara kepadanya kecuali dengan wahyu atau dari balik tabir." Dan ia berkata: 'Barangsiapa memberitahumu apa yang akan terjadi besok, ia telah berdusta,' lalu membaca: "Sesungguhnya hanya di sisi Allah ilmu tentang hari kiamat."'

57.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Fever, or intense fever, is from the heat of Hellfire, so cool it with water.'
57.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Demam, atau demam yang parah, berasal dari panasnya neraka Jahannam, maka dinginkanlah dengan air.'

58.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Fever, or intense fever, is from the heat of Hellfire, so cool it with water.'
58.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Demam, atau demam yang parah, berasal dari panasnya neraka Jahannam, maka dinginkanlah dengan air.'

59.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Day of Ashura was a day that Quraysh used to fast in the pre-Islamic period, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to fast it. When he came to Medina, he fasted it and commanded others to fast it. But when the fast of Ramadan was revealed, Ramadan became the obligation and Ashura was abandoned. Whoever wished would fast it, and whoever wished would not fast it.'
59.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Hari Asyura adalah hari yang biasa dipuasakan oleh kaum Quraisy pada masa jahiliyyah, dan Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berpuasa padanya. Ketika beliau tiba di Madinah, beliau berpuasa padanya dan memerintahkan orang lain untuk berpuasa. Tetapi ketika puasa Ramadan diwajibkan, Ramadan menjadi kewajiban dan Asyura ditinggalkan. Barangsiapa mau berpuasa padanya boleh, dan barangsiapa tidak mau boleh tidak.'

60.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Hind bint Utba said: 'O Messenger of Allah, Abu Sufyan is a stingy man and does not give me and my children enough unless I take from his wealth without his knowledge.' He said: 'Take what is sufficient for you and your children, in a reasonable manner.'
60.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Hind binti Utbah berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, Abu Sufyan adalah orang yang kikir dan tidak memberiku dan anak-anakku kecukupan kecuali yang aku ambil dari hartanya tanpa sepengetahuannya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Ambillah apa yang cukup bagimu dan anak-anakmu, dengan cara yang baik.'

61.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'A month would pass over the family of Muhammad ﷺ during which no fire was kindled in their home — they had nothing but dates and water, unless meat was brought to us.'
61.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Sebulan berlalu atas keluarga Muhammad ﷺ tanpa api dinyalakan di rumah mereka — mereka tidak memiliki apa-apa kecuali kurma dan air, kecuali jika daging dibawakan kepada kami.'

62.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform i'tikaf in the last ten days and say: "Seek it in the last ten days" — meaning Laylat al-Qadr.'
62.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa beri'tikaf pada sepuluh hari terakhir dan bersabda: "Carilah pada sepuluh hari terakhir" — maksudnya Lailatul Qadar.'

63.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to perform ruqyah saying: 'Wipe away the pain, O Lord of mankind; in Your hand is the healing; nothing can remove the hardship except You.'
63.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa meruqyah dengan mengatakan: 'Usaplah rasa sakit, wahai Tuhan manusia; di tangan-Mu lah kesembuhan; tidak ada yang dapat mengangkat kesulitan kecuali Engkau.'

64.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ never abandoned the two rak'ahs after Asr while he was with me.'
64.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ tidak pernah meninggalkan dua rakaat setelah Ashar selama beliau bersamaku.'

65.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray at night while she was lying across between him and the qibla on the mattress. When he wanted to perform witr, he would wake her.
65.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat malam sementara ia berbaring melintang antara beliau dan kiblat di atas kasur. Ketika beliau hendak melakukan witir, beliau membangunkannya.

66.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ was bewitched, and it seemed to him that he had done things which he had not done.'
66.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ terkena sihir, sehingga tampak kepadanya bahwa beliau telah melakukan hal-hal yang tidak beliau lakukan.'

67.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to observe i'tikaf in the mosque and tilt his head toward me, and I would comb it while I was menstruating.'
67.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa beri'tikaf di masjid dan memiringkan kepalanya ke arahku, dan aku menyisir rambutnya sementara aku sedang haid.'

68.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray thirteen rak'ahs at night, performing witr with five of them. He would not sit except at the fifth, and then he would give the salam.
68.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat tiga belas rakaat di malam hari, melakukan witir dengan lima di antaranya. Beliau tidak duduk kecuali pada rakaat kelima, kemudian memberi salam.

69.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'We slaughtered a sheep.' He said: 'O Messenger of Allah, nothing remains except the shoulder.' He said: 'All of it remains except the shoulder.'
69.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami menyembelih seekor domba.' Beliau bersabda: 'Wahai Rasulullah, tidak tersisa kecuali bagian bahunya.' Beliau bersabda: 'Semuanya tersisa kecuali bagian bahunya.'

70.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ was asked about the two rak'ahs before the Fajr prayer, and he said: 'They are more beloved to me than the entire world.'
70.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang dua rakaat sebelum shalat Fajar, dan beliau bersabda: 'Keduanya lebih aku cintai dari seluruh dunia.'

71.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'What is forbidden through breastfeeding is the same as what is forbidden through birth.' And from Abdullah ibn Abi Bakr from Amra from Aisha from the Prophet ﷺ similarly.
71.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Yang diharamkan karena persusuan adalah sama dengan yang diharamkan karena kelahiran.' Dan dari Abdullah bin Abi Bakr dari Amra dari Aisyah dari Nabi ﷺ hal yang serupa.

72.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'None of you should say "my soul has become foul," but rather say "my soul has become unsettled."'
72.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Jangan ada di antara kalian yang berkata "jiwaku telah menjadi keji," tetapi katakanlah "jiwaku menjadi tidak tenang."'

73.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ entered upon her while a woman was with her who was mentioned for her prayer. He said: 'Stop that. Do only what you are capable of, for by Allah, Allah does not tire until you tire. The most beloved of religion to Allah is that which its doer performs consistently.'
73.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ masuk menemui aisyah sementara ada seorang wanita bersamanya yang disebutkan tentang shalatnya. Beliau bersabda: 'Hentikan itu. Lakukan hanya apa yang mampu kalian lakukan, karena demi Allah, Allah tidak bosan hingga kalian bosan. Agama yang paling dicintai Allah adalah yang dilakukan oleh pelakunya secara konsisten.'

74.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When dinner is served and the prayer is called, begin with dinner.'
74.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ketika makan malam disajikan dan shalat dikumandangkan, mulailah dengan makan malam.'

75.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when it was said that the month has twenty-nine days and this was mentioned to her, she said: 'May Allah have mercy on Abu Abd al-Rahman. He only said that a month may be twenty-nine days.'
75.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika dikatakan bahwa bulan memiliki dua puluh sembilan hari dan hal ini disebutkan kepadanya, ia berkata: 'Semoga Allah merahmati Abu Abdurrahman. Ia hanya mengatakan bahwa sebulan bisa dua puluh sembilan hari.'

76.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the amount of water used for the ritual bath: the questioner indicated a vessel holding eight, nine, or ten ratls. Mujahid said: 'Aisha told me that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to bathe with the equivalent of this.'
76.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai jumlah air yang digunakan untuk mandi wajib: penanya menunjukkan sebuah wadah yang menampung delapan, sembilan, atau sepuluh ratl. Mujahid berkata: 'Aisyah memberitahuku bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mandi dengan setara ini.'

77.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was told that people had benefited from their sacrificial animals, carrying their fat and making waterskins from them. He said: 'What is that about?' They said: 'You forbade keeping the meat of sacrificial animals.' He said: 'I only forbade it because of the large gathering of people that had arrived. Eat, give charity, and store.'
77.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ diberitahu bahwa orang-orang telah memanfaatkan hewan kurban mereka, membawa lemaknya dan membuat kantong kulit darinya. Beliau bersabda: 'Apa itu?' Mereka berkata: 'Engkau melarang menyimpan daging hewan kurban.' Beliau bersabda: 'Aku hanya melarangnya karena banyaknya orang yang datang. Makanlah, bersedekahlah, dan simpanlah.'

78.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ, during an illness, led his companions in prayer while seated. They began to pray standing, so he gestured to them to sit. When he finished, he said: 'The imam is appointed to be followed. When he bows, bow; when he rises, rise; and when he prays seated, pray seated.'
78.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ, saat sakit, memimpin para sahabatnya shalat dalam keadaan duduk. Mereka mulai shalat dalam keadaan berdiri, maka beliau memberi isyarat kepada mereka untuk duduk. Ketika selesai, beliau bersabda: 'Imam ditetapkan untuk diikuti. Ketika ia ruku, rukuklah; ketika ia bangkit, bangkitlah; dan ketika ia shalat sambil duduk, shalatlah sambil duduk.'

79.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man said: 'My mother died suddenly and I think if she could have spoken she would have given charity. Will she receive a reward if I give charity on her behalf?' He said: 'Yes.'
79.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang pria berkata: 'Ibuku meninggal secara tiba-tiba dan aku kira jika ia bisa berbicara ia akan bersedekah. Apakah ia mendapat pahala jika aku bersedekah atas namanya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya.'

80.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said, while ill: 'When there was a righteous man among them and he died, they built a mosque over his grave and made pictures in it. Those people are the worst of creation before Allah on the Day of Resurrection.' She said: Umm Salama and Umm Habiba mentioned a church they had seen in the land of Abyssinia.
80.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda saat sakit: 'Ketika ada orang saleh di antara mereka dan ia wafat, mereka membangun masjid di atas kuburannya dan membuat gambar-gambar di dalamnya. Orang-orang itu adalah seburuk-buruk makhluk di hadapan Allah pada Hari Kiamat.' Ia berkata: Ummu Salamah dan Ummu Habibah menyebutkan sebuah gereja yang mereka lihat di tanah Habasyah.

81.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Uthman was told something, and he replied: 'Yes.' When the day of the siege came and he was surrounded, they said: 'O Commander of the Faithful, will you not fight?' He said: 'No. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ made a covenant with me, and I am patient with myself regarding it.'
81.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Utsman diberitahu sesuatu, dan ia menjawab: 'Ya.' Ketika hari pengepungan tiba dan ia dikepung, mereka berkata: 'Wahai Amirul Mukminin, apakah engkau tidak akan bertempur?' Ia berkata: 'Tidak. Rasulullah ﷺ telah membuat perjanjian denganku, dan aku bersabar atas diriku mengenai itu.'

82.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to us one day: "Which of you will be the one upon whom the dogs of al-Haw'ab will bark?"'
82.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada kami suatu hari: "Siapakah di antara kalian yang akan menjadi orang yang akan di吠 oleh anjing-anjing al-Haw'ab?"'

83.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to command the killing of the snake with two stripes, saying: 'It damages the fetus and impairs eyesight.'
83.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa memerintahkan membunuh ular yang memiliki dua garis, dengan mengatakan: 'Ia merusak janin dan melemahkan penglihatan.'

84.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that an infant was brought to the Prophet ﷺ so he could chew something soft for it to eat. He sat it on his lap and it urinated on him, so he called for water and followed it with water. Waki' said: He followed it with water and did not wash it.
84.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang bayi dibawa kepada Nabi ﷺ agar beliau bisa mengunyahkan sesuatu yang lembut untuknya. Beliau mendudukkan bayi itu di pangkuannya dan bayi itu kencing di atas beliau, maka beliau meminta air dan menyiramkan air di atasnya. Waki' berkata: Beliau menyiramkan air di atasnya dan tidak mencucinya.

85.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described the Prophet's ﷺ ritual bath: he would perform ablution for prayer, then run his fingers through the roots of his hair. When he was satisfied that he had reached the scalp, he would scoop three handfuls and pour them on his head, then pour water over the rest of his body.
85.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan mandi Nabi ﷺ: beliau berwudhu untuk shalat, kemudian menjalankan jari-jarinya melalui akar rambutnya. Ketika beliau yakin telah mencapai kulit kepala, beliau menyiduk tiga cidukan air dan menuangkannya di atas kepalanya, kemudian menuangkan air ke seluruh tubuhnya.

86.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I never saw the Prophet ﷺ recite anything during his night prayer while seated — until he became old, when he would recite seated. When thirty or forty verses of the surah remained, he would stand and recite them, then bow.'
86.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah melihat Nabi ﷺ membaca apapun dalam shalat malamnya sambil duduk — hingga beliau menua, maka beliau membaca sambil duduk. Ketika tiga puluh atau empat puluh ayat dari surah itu tersisa, beliau berdiri dan membacanya, lalu ruku.'

87.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ raised his hands and said: 'O Allah, I am only human; I become angry as humans become angry. So for any believing man or woman whom I have cursed, make it a purification and cleansing for them.'
87.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengangkat tangannya dan berdoa: 'Ya Allah, aku hanyalah manusia; aku marah sebagaimana manusia marah. Maka bagi setiap mukmin pria atau wanita yang aku telah kutuk, jadikanlah itu sebagai penyucian dan pembersihan bagi mereka.'

88.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Jibreel kept recommending to me about the neighbor until I thought he would make him an heir.'
88.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Jibril terus-menerus merekomendasikan kepadaku tentang tetangga sehingga aku mengira ia akan menjadikannya sebagai ahli waris.'

89.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never left in his house a garment that had a cross pattern without removing it.'
89.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah membiarkan di rumahnya sebuah pakaian yang memiliki motif salib tanpa melepasnya.'

90.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray the two rak'ahs between the adhan and the Fajr prayer.
90.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat dua rakaat antara adzan dan shalat Fajar.

91.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ signaled them not to force-feed him medicine. They said: 'He dislikes medicine like a sick person.' But when he regained consciousness, he said: 'Did I not forbid you from force-feeding me medicine? All of you must be force-fed except al-Abbas, for he was not present with you.'
91.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memberi isyarat agar mereka tidak memaksanya minum obat. Mereka berkata: 'Beliau tidak suka obat seperti orang sakit.' Tetapi ketika beliau sadar, beliau bersabda: 'Bukankah aku telah melarang kalian memaksaku minum obat? Semua kalian harus dipaksa minum kecuali al-Abbas, karena ia tidak hadir bersama kalian.'

92.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whatever afflicts a Muslim, it becomes a reward and an expiation for him.'
92.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apa pun yang menimpa seorang Muslim, itu menjadi pahala dan penghapus dosa baginya.'

93.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The matter is too serious for any of them to be concerned about that.' She then narrated what the Prophet ﷺ mentioned about the Day of Judgment similarly.
93.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Perkara ini terlalu serius bagi siapa pun di antara mereka untuk dikuatirkan.' Ia kemudian meriwayatkan apa yang disebutkan Nabi ﷺ tentang Hari Kiamat secara serupa.

94.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'We had a curtain with a bird figure on it.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Change it, for whenever I see it, I am reminded of the world.' They also had a velvet cloth they wore that he said had silk patterns.
94.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Kami memiliki tirai dengan gambar burung di atasnya.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Gantilah, karena setiap kali aku melihatnya, aku teringat dunia.' Mereka juga memiliki kain beludru yang mereka kenakan yang beliau katakan memiliki motif sutra.

95.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ lengthened the bowing, then rose and lengthened the standing, then prostrated and lengthened the prostration — this was the solar eclipse prayer. Then he said: 'You will be tried in your graves like the trial of the Dajjal.' She said: After that she heard him seeking refuge in Allah from the punishment of the grave.
95.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memanjangkan ruku, kemudian bangkit dan memanjangkan berdiri, kemudian bersujud dan memanjangkan sujud — ini adalah shalat gerhana matahari. Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Kalian akan diuji di kuburan kalian seperti ujian Dajjal.' Ia berkata: Setelah itu ia mendengar beliau berlindung kepada Allah dari azab kubur.

96.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she described the witr prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'We used to prepare his toothstick and his water for purification, then Allah would wake him whenever He willed at night. He would use the toothstick, perform ablution, and pray eight rak'ahs without sitting except at the eighth, where he would sit and make remembrance.'
96.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menggambarkan shalat witir Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Kami biasa menyiapkan siwak dan air bersucinya, kemudian Allah membangunkannya kapanpun Dia kehendaki di malam hari. Beliau bersiwak, berwudhu, dan shalat delapan rakaat tanpa duduk kecuali pada rakaat kedelapan, di mana beliau duduk dan berdzikir.'

97.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: "No prayer should be performed in the presence of food, nor when one is being restrained by the two needs [i.e., urination and defecation]."'
97.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Tidak boleh dilakukan shalat di hadapan makanan, dan tidak pula ketika seseorang ditahan oleh dua kebutuhan [yaitu buang air kecil dan besar]."'

98.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'There was nothing from the voluntary prayers that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was more consistent in performing than the two rak'ahs before the Fajr prayer.'
98.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Tidak ada dari shalat-shalat sunnah yang lebih konsisten dilakukan oleh Rasulullah ﷺ daripada dua rakaat sebelum shalat Fajar.'

99.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ married me in Shawwal and I was brought to him in Shawwal. Which of his wives was more favored with him than me?' So she used to prefer that women enter their marriages in Shawwal.
99.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ menikahinya pada bulan Syawal dan aku dibawa kepadanya pada bulan Syawal. Siapakah di antara istri-istrinya yang lebih disukai oleh beliau daripada aku?' Maka ia biasa lebih menyukai agar wanita memasuki pernikahan mereka pada bulan Syawal.

100.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Bilal calls the adhan at night, so eat and drink until Ibn Umm Maktum calls the adhan.' He said: The gap between them was no more than the time it took one to descend and the other to ascend.
100.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Bilal mengumandangkan adzan di malam hari, maka makanlah dan minumlah hingga Ibnu Ummu Maktum mengumandangkan adzan.' Ia berkata: Jarak antara keduanya tidak lebih dari waktu yang dibutuhkan satu orang untuk turun dan yang lain naik.
